---
description: 'Plan a feature — turn a vague request into a scoped implementation plan'
---

Read `ARCHITECTURE.md` and `.github/copilot-instructions.md` first.

1. Ask clarifying questions to scope the work
2. Research the relevant codebase areas
3. Produce a plan following the format in `.github/agents/01-planner.md`
4. Save approved plan to `docs/ai/plans/YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md`
5. Wait for user approval before any implementation
